author: anon-581fd578
content: Root cause: wgpu v29's SurfaceTarget::Window variant requires the display handle to have been set via InstanceDescriptor::display first. On Windows, we must either (a) use SurfaceTarget::DisplayAndWindow which bundles both handles, or (b) pass the display handle at Instance creation. Fix: switch create_surface to use the Arc<Window> directly — winit's Window implements both HasWindowHandle and HasDisplayHandle, so passing it as SurfaceTarget::DisplayAndWindow (via Box<dyn DisplayAndWindowHandle>) should work.
